info.title: Withdrawal Generic API
info.description: Generic Withdrawal API v2 allows identifying the most suitable liquidity source and executing payouts to bank cards, SEPA accounts, and other payment methods.

post.description: Checks the availability of the withdrawal service and validates the current credentials.
Retrieves the current available balance for withdrawals, including a breakdown by liquidity sources.

Creates a new withdrawal operation or returns the state of an existing one. The engine automatically selects the best liquidity source. The operation remains in a pending state until `start_operation` is called.
Creates a new withdrawal operation or returns the state of an existing one using a specific liquidity source ID. The operation remains in a pending state until `start_operation` is called.
Retrieves the current status and details of a withdrawal operation by its client ID.
Initiates the execution of a previously created withdrawal operation. If the operation is not in a valid state to start, an error is returned.
Attempts to stop the execution of a withdrawal operation. Success depends on the current stage of processing by the liquidity provider.
Retrieves the URL and parameters needed for user interaction (e.g., 3DS verification) when the operation is in `USER_INPUT` state.
Acknowledges that the operation has reached a final state on the client side. Transitions the operation to `COMPLETE_CONFIRMED`.

BankCardInputApiView.description: Bank card details provided for the transaction.

GenericWithdrawalOperationStateApiView.description: Full details of the withdrawal operation state.

project_id.description: Project ID associated with the operation.

version.description: Version of the operation state (optimistic locking).

explicit_liquidity_source_id.description: ID of the explicitly requested liquidity source (if any).

order_amount_alternatives.description: Alternative amounts in different currencies (if applicable).

recipient_payment_method.description: Payment method details of the recipient.

disallow_end_user_interaction.description: If true, user interaction is not allowed.

disallow_transaction_split.description: If true, transaction splitting is not allowed.

execution_suspended.description: Indicates if execution is currently suspended.

result_status.description: Final result status of the operation.

sub_account_id.description: Sub-account ID used for the operation.

RecipientPaymentMethodInputApiView.description: Recipient payment details provided for the transaction.

UserApiView.description: User information associated with the operation.

user_id.description: Unique user identifier in your system.

url.description: URL to redirect the user to.

details.example: Operation with this ID does not exist.

WithdrawGenericCheckHealthRequest.description: Empty object for health check request.

details.example: Operation is not in a state to be confirmed.

liquidity_source_id.description: Explicit ID of the liquidity source.

WithdrawGenericCreateExplicitSourceRespo.description: Response for create explicit source operation.

WithdrawGenericCreateExplicitSourceResul.description: Result of create explicit source operation.

details.example: Operation is not in USER_INPUT state.

details.example: Operation cannot be started from current state.
